parameters.content:
## [Admin] Eval Status v1.0.0

**Trigger:** GET /caiac/admin/eval/status?job_id={uuid}
**Auth:** HMAC (x-caiac-timestamp + x-caiac-signature) + Authorization: Bearer token
**Access:** is_caiac_staff=true only

Returns the current status of an async Ragas eval job from caiac.eval_jobs.

**States:** pending -> running -> passed | failed
**Kicked off by:** POST /caiac/admin/eval (Run Ragas Eval workflow)

Notes:
- signing_key is the Bearer token itself (same contract as other admin endpoints)
- job_id must be a valid UUID from caiac.eval_jobs
- webhook_secret is resolved by joining eval_jobs -> clients

parameters.query:
SELECT c.id, c.webhook_secret
FROM caiac.eval_jobs ej
JOIN caiac.clients c ON ej.client_id = c.id
WHERE ej.id = '{{ $('Receive Eval Status Request').item.json.query.job_id }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timestamp: $('Receive Eval Status Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-timestamp'], signature: $('Receive Eval Status Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-signature'], signing_key: $('Receive Eval Status Request').item.json.headers.authorization.replace('Bearer ', '').trim(), secret: $input.first().json.webhook_secret }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT s.user_id, s.role, s.client_id, s.expires_at,
       u.name, u.email, u.active as user_active, u.is_caiac_staff,
       c.slug, c.active as client_active
FROM caiac.sessions s
JOIN caiac.users u ON s.user_id = u.id
JOIN caiac.clients c ON s.client_id = c.id
WHERE s.token = '{{ $('Check HMAC Valid').item.json.token }}'
AND s.expires_at > NOW()
AND u.active = true
AND c.active = true
LIMIT 1

SELECT status, faithfulness, context_precision, passed,
       error_message, started_at, completed_at
FROM caiac.eval_jobs
WHERE id = '{{ $('Receive Eval Status Request').item.json.query.job_id }}'
LIMIT 1
